gist.headline: Fresh sprout in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: A brand new community app just took root in our showcase. We love seeing what the hive builds!
gist.summary: Added a new community-built application to the Pollinations app showcase and greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore another creative project built with the Pollinations API.
gist.visual_concept: The PR updates the 'GREENHOUSE' and 'APPS' directories. The visual metaphor is literally a greenhouse where apps grow. Polly the bee acting as a gardener tending to a new digital plant.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing digital code-plant inside a glass greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
